args.message: Ah, the rental fleet history! You know, that actually speaks volumes about how well this car has been maintained. Rental companies, especially ones like Enterprise, have rigorous maintenance schedules – often *more* rigorous than the average private owner. They have to keep their fleets in perfect running order. So, while it was part of a fleet, think of it as having had consistent, professional upkeep its entire life. That history actually *adds* to its reliability, in my book!
